close_reason: Implemented rustdeps cell following godeps pattern. Uses rust-deps.toml with Nix hashes, fetchzip for crates.io, generates BUCK files.
description:
Create rustdeps-gen tool that wraps reindeer to generate Buck2 targets from Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock.

Similar pattern to godeps-gen:
- Parse Cargo.toml for dependencies
- Run reindeer vendor + buckify under the hood
- Generate rust-deps.toml or directly output BUCK files
- Support Nix-based third-party cell like godeps

Reference: https://github.com/facebookincubator/reindeer
See: examples/rust-deps/ for the pattern
title: Rust deps cell: reindeer integration
